title: Phase 5: Multi-chain payments and polish
description:
Expand payment support and harden metadata resistance.

Payments:
- Monero integration: monero-rs, light wallet mode (connect to remote node)
- MobileCoin integration: if user demand warrants it
- Chain selection in /pay command: /pay alice 10 ZEC vs /pay alice 10 XMR

UX polish:
- ratatui TUI replacing current line-mode chat (split panes: message list + input)
- Contacts list with online/offline status indicators
- Message delivery status: sent / delivered / read receipts (optional, user-toggleable)

Metadata resistance:
- Envelope padding: pad all payloads to fixed bucket sizes (256, 512, 1024, 4096 bytes)
- Delivery delay jitter: relay holds messages 0-500ms random before delivering (prevents timing correlation)
- Cover traffic: optional dummy messages to mask send patterns

Federation: decided NO for now — single-relay model preserves legal clarity and simplifies key distribution.
